Cao Miao śõĻŤčó
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Miao (śõĻŤčó). Ennobled as Township Duke of Gaoyang. Son of Cao Zhi. Cao Miao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
